name: zutil_zrdr_create_search_path_list
description: zUtil_ZRDR_CreateSearchPathList creates an empty archive list and populates it from search-path text.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare passed with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 8 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 25 bytes and the VC object body is 32 bytes with 7 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The native smoke verifies empty-list allocation followed by population from valid search-path text.
